Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Ian A. Hansen, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709), Attorney for plaintiff/moving party

Audrey Smith, Esq. of Howie & Smith (650-685-9300), Attorney for defendant/opposing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:
Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is DENIED without prejudice to additional, more narrowly focused, discovery. Written order is signed and filed.
